MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: EDWIN TRAIN CALDWELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JANICE MCKNIGHT is granted. Order signed in open Court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. (212) Written sanction order not issued. Plaintiff's attorney appeared late. Proceedings not reported. (212)
